home.title: Care that connects people.
home.description: Reliable home care with heart, cultural understanding and time for what truly matters – in your own home in Mainz.
home.introEyebrow: Well cared for. Understood. At home.
home.introText: Every person has their own story, language and way of life. We listen, tailor our support carefully and bring reliability to everyday life.
home.servicesText: From prescribed nursing care to personal companionship – together we find the right support.
home.valuesText: Professional quality and genuine compassion belong together.
home.trustText: Qualifications and certificates will be published here in full after approval.
home.closingTitle: Let’s talk calmly about your situation.
home.closingText: No obligation, personal and easy to understand. We explain the next steps.

services.title: Care services that see the whole person
services.description: We combine nursing expertise with personal attention and tailor every service to real needs.

items.title: Prescribed nursing care
items.text: Medically necessary procedures prescribed by a doctor, delivered safely at home.
details: Blood sugar and blood pressure checks

items.title: Personal care
items.text: Respectful help with daily needs while preserving independence and dignity.

items.title: Companionship
items.text: Time, attention and practical relief for a better quality of life at home.

items.title: Private services
items.text: Flexible additional help whenever you want more support or company.

items.title: Medical services
items.text: Coordinated support in close contact with medical practices, pharmacies and partners.

process.title: First conversation
process.text: Tell us about your situation by phone or form.

process.title: Personal consultation
process.text: We explain needs, options and funding transparently.

process.title: Suitable care
process.text: We schedule reliably and stay in close contact.

values.title: Reliability
values.text: Careful planning and open communication provide stability.

values.title: Empathy
values.text: We see the person, not only the care need.

values.title: Dignity
values.text: Self-determination and respect shape every encounter.

values.title: Professionalism
values.text: Expertise, care and continuous quality are our standard.

values.title: Openness
values.text: We listen and meet different lives without prejudice.

values.title: Trust
values.text: Closeness grows when words and actions match.

about.title: A care service that builds bridges
about.description: Brückenherz stands for professional home care that creates closeness and understands diversity.
about.storyTitle: Supporting independent life at home since 2026
about.storyText1: Brückenherz was founded in Mainz on 10 June 2026 from the conviction that good care must be professionally strong, humanly warm and culturally sensitive.
about.storyText2: We build bridges between people, families, languages and services through clear agreements, flexible solutions and equal partnership.
about.teamText: Team photos and personal profiles will follow after the professional photo shoot.
about.missionText: We treat every person as we would want ourselves or our relatives to be treated: attentively, reliably and respectfully.

contact.title: We take time for your questions
contact.description: Whether care is just beginning, you want to change providers or relatives need relief: contact us without obligation.
contact.name: Full name
contact.subject: What is this about?
contact.messageHint: Please do not send diagnoses or particularly sensitive health data.
contact.bookText: Tell us your preferred date. We will confirm it personally.
contact.bookingSuccess: Thank you. We will contact you to confirm your preferred appointment.

career.title: Care needs people with heart and integrity
career.description: Help us build a service where expertise, respect and cultural openness are lived values.
career.introText: We are building our team in Mainz and welcome people who take responsibility, listen and make care personal.

jobs.title: Registered nurse (all genders)
jobs.text: For prescribed care, advice and reliable support.

jobs.title: Care assistant (all genders)
jobs.text: For compassionate personal care and everyday support.

jobs.title: Open application
jobs.text: Feel at home with our values? We would like to meet you.

career.fileHint: PDF, JPG or PNG, maximum 5 MB. Files are processed only for recruitment.
career.applicationSuccess: Thank you for applying. We will contact you personally.

blog.title: Knowledge that helps in everyday care
blog.description: Clear guidance for people needing care and their families – practical and useful.

articles.title: Applying for a care level: preparing for the assessment
articles.excerpt: Useful documents and why a care diary can help.
body: A care level can open access to important support. The application starts with the insured person’s care fund.
Record where help is needed over several days. Concrete examples make daily needs easier to understand.
This article provides general orientation and is not individual legal or care advice.

articles.title: Accepting help before your strength runs out
articles.excerpt: Why early support is a sign of responsibility.
body: Family carers often carry a heavy load for a long time. Small breaks can protect their own health.
Talk early about tasks, limits and available support. Home care can help occasionally or regularly.
A no-obligation consultation brings clarity without committing you.

articles.title: What is prescribed nursing care?
articles.excerpt: A short guide to doctor-prescribed care at home.
body: Prescribed nursing care includes medical procedures ordered by a doctor and performed at home.
Examples include medication, wound care or compression therapy. Availability depends on the prescription and funding approval.
We explain the process clearly and coordinate with medical practices.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions, clearly answered
faq.description: Initial answers about home care, costs and starting support.

items.a: This depends on the support required and current capacity. Call us for an honest personal assessment.
Depending on the service, health insurance, care insurance or the individual may pay. We explain possible routes transparently.

items.q: What is the difference between personal and prescribed care?
items.a: Personal care helps with daily needs such as hygiene or mobility. Prescribed care covers medical procedures ordered by a doctor.

items.q: Can I change my care provider?
items.a: Generally yes. Existing contracts and notice periods should be checked first.
We are continually expanding our multilingual service. Tell us your preferred language when you contact us.

items.q: What should I prepare for the first meeting?
items.a: Existing decisions, prescriptions and a short overview can help, but are not required for a first call.

faq.ctaText: We answer personally and in plain language.

legal.imprintIntro: Information under section 5 of the German Digital Services Act (DDG)
legal.register: Commercial register: [TODO: add court and registration number]
legal.responsible: Responsible for editorial content under section 18(2) MStV: [TODO: add name], address as above.
legal.disclaimer: We prepare this website carefully but cannot guarantee accuracy, completeness or currency. External site operators are solely responsible for their content.
legal.privacyIntro: This notice explains how personal data is processed when you visit this website or use our forms.
legal.dataText: Technically necessary connection data is processed when the site is accessed. Form details are used only to handle your contact, appointment or application request.
legal.basisText: Processing is based on pre-contractual steps, consent or legitimate interests as appropriate. Data is deleted when no longer needed unless statutory duties apply.
legal.processorsText: We use hosting and email providers contractually bound to privacy and security. Transfers outside the EEA require a lawful basis and safeguards.
legal.rightsText: You may request access, correction, deletion, restriction, portability or object. Consent can be withdrawn for the future. You may complain to a data protection authority.
legal.cookiesText: Only technically necessary cookies are used. The map loads only after your choice and may send data to Google. No marketing or tracking cookies are used.
legal.accessibilityIntro: Brückenherz aims to make this site accessible to as many people as possible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA.
legal.statusText: The site uses semantic structure, keyboard support, visible focus, strong contrast and adaptable layouts. An independent audit is pending.
legal.limitationsText: The supplied logo contains small text within the image; equivalent text is available for every function. External maps may be outside our control.
legal.feedbackText: If you find a barrier, email or call us and name the page and device. We will work on a timely solution.

footer.copyright: Brückenherz Ambulanter Pflegedienst. All rights reserved.
footer.noEmergency: Not an emergency service. In an emergency call 112.
